clips.label: Briefing + Kill Count Banter
clips.start_cue: I cannot believe we're back here again.
clips.end_cue: May the Force be with you.
clips.start_matched: I cannot believe we're back here again.
clips.end_matched: May the Force be with you.

clips.label: The Assault Begins
clips.start_cue: Good thing those bugs can't aim.
clips.end_cue: We're going down. Brace yourselves!
clips.start_matched: Good thing those bugs can't aim.
clips.end_matched: We're hit! We're going down! Brace yourselves!

clips.label: Scaling the Wall
clips.start_cue: Just keep us covered, Rex.
clips.end_cue: Come on, Rex. Up and away.
clips.start_matched: - So, what's the plan, General? - Just keep us covered, Rex.
clips.end_matched: - Come on, Rex. - Up and away!

clips.label: Briefing Bickering
clips.start_cue: Master, my briefings might go better if you didn't interrupt me
clips.end_cue: Here we go.
clips.start_matched: You know, Master, my briefings might go better if you didn't interrupt me every time I tried to...
clips.end_matched: Here we go!

clips.label: Into the Catacombs
clips.start_cue: I should go in first. I know the way.
clips.end_cue: It's not left, it's up.
clips.start_matched: - Nice work. Well, here goes nothing. - I should go in first. I know the way.
clips.end_matched: lt's not left. lt's up.

clips.label: Trapped + The Contrast
clips.start_cue: Those bombs are going to go off any second now.
clips.end_cue: I still plan on celebrating this victory with my Padawan in person.
clips.start_matched: Where are they? Those bombs are gonna go off any second now. Rex, any sign ofAhsoka or Barriss on your side? No, sir. But this place is getting ready to blow.
clips.end_matched: Well, I still plan on celebrating this victory with my Padawan, in person.

clips.label: The Rescue
clips.start_cue: Wait. I'm picking up a pulse on Ahsoka's comm channel.
clips.end_cue: Your Master never lost faith in you.
clips.start_matched: Wait. I'm picking up a pulse on Ahsoka's comm channel.
clips.end_matched: lndeed. Your Master never lost faith in you.

clips.label: The Council Says No
clips.start_cue: We've had no further contact with General Plo Koon.
clips.end_cue: We will deploy, as you've instructed, Master.
clips.start_matched: We've had no further contact with General Plo Koon.
clips.end_matched: Excuse my Padawan. We will deploy as you have instructed, Master.

clips.label: Lives Are in Danger
clips.start_cue: Ahsoka! If anyone could survive, Master Plo could.
clips.end_cue: That's what I'm trying to teach you my young padawan.
clips.start_matched: Ahsoka! If anyone could survive, Master Plo could! I don't understand why...
clips.end_matched: That's what I'm trying to teach you, my young Padawan.

clips.label: Not to Me
clips.start_cue: Sergeant, why are you so certain no one is coming?
clips.end_cue: Your men are safe now.
clips.start_matched: PLO: Sergeant, why are you so certain no one is coming?
clips.end_matched: Your men are safe now.

clips.label: Escape + Coda
clips.start_cue: There's a massive vessel approaching.
clips.end_cue: Right beside you, Master.
clips.start_matched: There's a massive vessel approaching.
clips.end_matched: -So, come on. Let's go. -Right beside you, master.

clips.label: Ahsoka Taken
clips.start_cue: I can't believe my luck. A Jedi youngling.
clips.end_cue: The youngling will provide great sport.
clips.start_matched: I can't believe my luck, a Jedi youngling.
clips.end_matched: The youngling will provide great sport.

clips.label: My Master Will Never Forgive Me
clips.start_cue: My master will never forgive me for running and hiding
clips.end_cue: We are Jedi.
clips.start_matched: My Master would never forgive me for running and hiding in a situation like this.
clips.end_matched: We are Jedi.

clips.label: Kalifa's Death
clips.start_cue: That's their fortress.
clips.end_cue: I'll take care of the others. I know you will.
clips.start_matched: That's their fortress.
clips.end_matched: I'll take care of the others. I know you will.

clips.label: Anakin's Desperation
clips.start_cue: Not good enough, Rex. Try again.
clips.end_cue: she is able to take care of herself.
clips.start_matched: Not good enough, Rex, try again.
clips.end_matched: I'll take care of the others.

clips.label: We Go Down With a Fight
clips.start_cue: If it's only a matter of time that we die, I say we go down with a fight.
clips.end_cue: Get ready, we'll have to be swift.
clips.start_matched: If it's only a matter of time till we die, I say we go down with a fight.
clips.end_matched: Get ready, we'll have to be swift.

clips.label: The Final Battle
clips.start_cue: [Stolen speeder approaches Trandoshan fortress]
clips.end_cue: Your son died because of your own actions. Not mine.
clips.end_matched: Your son died because of your own actions, not mine.
clips.notes: START is visual — needs manual timestamp (estimated from END minus 2:00)

clips.label: The Reunion
clips.start_cue: It is good to see you safe, little Ahsoka.
clips.end_cue: You're welcome, my Padawan.
clips.start_matched: It is good to see you safe, little Soka.
clips.end_matched: You're welcome, my Padawan.

clips.label: You Either Do or Die
clips.start_cue: Ahsoka, I'm sorry I didn't tell you earlier, but you won't be coming along
clips.end_cue: That should be my choice.
clips.start_matched: Ahsoka, I'm sorry I didn't tell you earlier, but you won't be coming along on this one.
clips.end_matched: That should be my choice.

clips.label: Following Direct Orders
clips.start_cue: Hey, snips.
clips.end_cue: Welcome aboard.
clips.start_matched: -Hey, Snips. -Hey, Master.
clips.end_matched: Welcome aboard.

clips.label: Ahsoka Proves Her Point
clips.start_cue: Too small for you maybe, but I think I can squeeze through.
clips.end_cue: See, I can handle myself after all.
clips.start_matched: Too small for you, maybe, but I think I can squeeze through.
clips.end_matched: See? I can handle myself after all.

clips.label: Tarkin's Poison
clips.start_cue: I am beginning to admire the design of this fortress.
clips.end_cue: Well, I see we agree on something.
clips.start_matched: lam beginning to admire the design of this fortress.
clips.end_matched: Well, I see we agree on something.

clips.label: Trust and Gratitude
clips.start_cue: It's when things don't go as planned that we Jedi are at our best.
clips.end_cue: I reserve my trust for those who understand gratitude, Captain Tarkin.
clips.start_matched: It's when things do not go as planned that concerns me. - What then? -it's when things don't go as planned that we Jedi are at our best. Trust me.
clips.end_matched: And I reserve my trust for those who understand gratitude, Captain Tarkin.

clips.label: Jedi Who Disappoint Us
clips.start_cue: Master, I'm relieved we solved this case, but
clips.end_cue: as long as we know there are good Jedi who fight for what's right
clips.start_matched: Master, I'm relieved we solved this case, but...
clips.end_matched: But as long as we know there are good Jedi who fight for what's right,

clips.label: Warmth: Dinner and Home
clips.start_cue: You're late again.
clips.end_cue: I hope you at least told Padme I said hello.
clips.start_matched: You're late again.
clips.end_matched: I hope you at least told Padmé I said hello.

clips.label: Friction: The Argument
clips.start_cue: Senator Amidala.
clips.end_cue: Duty comes first, especially in wartime.
clips.start_matched: - Senator Amidala. - General Skywalker.
clips.end_matched: Don't take it personally, Anakin. Duty comes first, especially in wartime.

clips.label: Devotion: Lightsaber Gift
clips.start_cue: We should go away together.
clips.end_cue: Believe me now?
clips.start_matched: We should go away together.
clips.end_matched: -Wow, it's heavier than I thought. -It's yours. Believe me now?

clips.label: Possession: I Demand
clips.start_cue: Why didn't you just say no?
clips.end_cue: Yes, of course. General Skywalker.
clips.start_matched: Why didn't you just say no?
clips.end_matched: Yes, of course. General Skywalker.

clips.label: Palpatine's Validation
clips.start_cue: You look troubled, Anakin.
clips.end_cue: No. I won't.
clips.start_matched: You look troubled, Anakin.
clips.end_matched: No. I won't.

clips.label: Not to Me Cold Open
clips.start_cue: We're just clones, sir. We're meant to be expendable.
clips.end_cue: Not to me.
clips.start_matched: SINKER: We're just clones, sir. We're meant to be expendable.
clips.end_matched: Not to me.

clips.label: The Shinies
clips.start_cue: [Rookie clones on watch]
clips.end_cue: This is the most boring post in the outer rim.
clips.end_matched: but you landed on the most boring post in the Outer Rim.
clips.notes: START is visual — needs manual timestamp (estimated from END minus 1:30)

clips.label: The Post Falls
clips.start_cue: [Explosion / breach]
clips.end_cue: [Rookies escape through ventilation shaft]
clips.notes: Both cues are visual — needs manual timestamps

clips.label: Rex Arrives
clips.start_cue: [Rex and Cody's shuttle approaching]
clips.end_cue: Nice shot. The name's Rex. But you'll call me Captain, or Sir.
clips.end_matched: HEVY: Nice shot! The name's Rex. But you'll call me Captain or sir.
clips.notes: START is visual — needs manual timestamp (estimated from END minus 2:30)

clips.label: Hevy's Sacrifice
clips.start_cue: We need to destroy this station before the fleet arrives.
clips.end_cue: [Explosion seen from orbit]
clips.start_matched: We can use the L.T. This moon freezes for over half the year.
clips.notes: END is visual — needs manual timestamp (estimated from START plus 3:00)

clips.label: The Handprint
clips.start_cue: [Rex, Cody, Echo, Fives in formation]
clips.end_cue: [Rex presses Hevy's handprint onto his helmet]
clips.notes: Both cues are visual — needs manual timestamps

clips.label: Krell Arrives
clips.start_cue: Master Krell, my thanks for the air support.
clips.end_cue: That is all.
clips.start_matched: Master Krell, my thanks for the air support.
clips.end_matched: That is all.

clips.label: Refuses Rest
clips.start_cue: Sir, we've been keeping this pace for 12 hours now.
clips.end_cue: Do I make myself clear, CT-7567?
clips.start_matched: Sir, we've been keeping this pace for 12 hours now.
clips.end_matched: Do I make myself clear, CT-7567?

clips.label: Not Clones! Men!
clips.start_cue: CT-7567. Do you have a malfunction in your design?
clips.end_cue: Dismissed.
clips.start_matched: CT-7567. Do you have a malfunction in your design?
clips.end_matched: Dismissed.

clips.label: Engineered to Think
clips.start_cue: A few of General Skywalker's plans seemed reckless, too
clips.end_cue: I honor my code. That's what I believe.
clips.start_matched: General Krell would like to see them in the tower.
clips.end_matched: for actions that were clearly mine. Fives!
clips.notes: Low confidence match (min score 0.44)

clips.label: Hardcase's Sacrifice
clips.start_cue: Ray shields.
clips.end_cue: Live to fight another day.
clips.start_matched: Activate ray shields.
clips.end_matched: Live to fight another day.

clips.label: The Firing Squad
clips.start_cue: Will the prisoners request to be blindfolded?
clips.end_cue: Good luck finding anyone to do it.
clips.start_matched: It'll be okay, buddy. This will ease the pain. The capital city's too fortified. We need your battalion to help us take it.
clips.end_matched: about finding another way to destroy those tanks?
clips.notes: Low confidence match (min score 0.51)

clips.label: The Fratricide
clips.start_cue: Stay alert. The enemy has our weapons and our armor
clips.end_cue: What have we done?
clips.start_matched: Captain. Report. What is our situation? General, we have taken the base and cut off enemy supply lines to the capital. Luck has smiled on you today, Captain. Consider yourself fortunate.
clips.end_matched: Captain. Report. What is our situation? General, we have taken the base and cut off enemy supply lines to the capital.
clips.notes: Low confidence match (min score 0.50)

clips.label: Dogma Shoots Krell
clips.start_cue: Something has to be done.
clips.end_cue: I had to. He betrayed us.
clips.start_matched: It'll be okay, buddy. This will ease the pain. The capital city's too fortified. We need your battalion to help us take it. Resistance from the Umbarans has been greater than anticipated.
clips.end_matched: Its head is ray-shielded!
clips.notes: Low confidence match (min score 0.48)

clips.label: What Happens to Us Then?
clips.start_cue: We did it. We took Umbara.
clips.end_cue: What happens to us then?
clips.start_matched: Move it, trooper.
clips.end_matched: What were you thinking?
clips.notes: Low confidence match (min score 0.47)

clips.label: Blue Squadron Launch
clips.start_cue: This is my first time commanding a squadron R7
clips.end_cue: Here we go.
clips.start_matched: This is my first time commanding a squadron, R7.
clips.end_matched: Here we go.

clips.label: Ahsoka Refuses to Retreat
clips.start_cue: We've got their fighters occupied.
clips.end_cue: She's not turning around.
clips.start_matched: We've got their fighters occupied.
clips.end_matched: There's no turning around.

clips.label: The Squadron Dies
clips.start_cue: Ax, are you still there?
clips.end_cue: Jump to lightspeed.
clips.start_matched: Axe, are you still there?
clips.end_matched: Jump to lightspeed.

clips.label: Anakin's Disappointment
clips.start_cue: Get your squad together. I need a head count.
clips.end_cue: Take heart, little one. That's the reality of command.
clips.start_matched: Get your squad together. I need a head count.
clips.end_matched: Take heart, little one. That's the reality of command.

clips.label: They're All Gone
clips.start_cue: He is stable for now.
clips.end_cue: No, R2, the other one.
clips.start_matched: He is stable for now.
clips.end_matched: ANAKIN: No, Artoo, the other one.

clips.label: Ahsoka Pushed to Lead
clips.start_cue: You wanted to see me, Master.
clips.end_cue: Good luck.
clips.start_matched: You wanted to see me, Master?
clips.end_matched: -Master, wait! -Good luck.

clips.label: Ahsoka Improvises + Victory
clips.start_cue: If we took the Resolute and angled her hull
clips.end_cue: I'm just sitting here watching the show.
clips.start_matched: If we took the Resolute and angled her hull against the incoming frigates,
clips.end_matched: Yep, I'm just sitting here watching the show.

clips.label: Temple Bombing
clips.start_cue: Master Yoda.
clips.end_cue: Then I guess we'll have to go to even greater lengths to catch him.
clips.start_matched: Master Yoda...
clips.end_matched: Then I guess we'll have to go to even greater lengths to catch him.

clips.label: Letta Strangled / Ahsoka Framed
clips.start_cue: I'm Commander Tano. Letta Turmond requested to see me.
clips.end_cue: I did not kill that woman.
clips.start_matched: I'm Commander Tano. Letta Turmond requested to see me.
clips.end_matched: I did not kill that woman!

clips.label: Escape: Wish Me Luck
clips.start_cue: Ahsoka! It's me, Anakin. Stop running.
clips.end_cue: I do trust you. Wish me luck.
clips.start_matched: Ahsoka! It's me, Anakin ! Stop running!
clips.end_matched: I know you do. Wish me luck.

clips.label: Ahsoka Contacts Barriss
clips.start_cue: Barriss, it's Ahsoka.
clips.end_cue: Thank you, Barriss. Be safe.
clips.start_matched: Barriss, it's Ahsoka.
clips.end_matched: Thank you, Barriss. Be safe.

clips.label: Ventress Alliance
clips.start_cue: Well, well, I didn't believe it when I first heard it
clips.end_cue: These are strange times.
clips.start_matched: Well, well. I didn't believe it when I first heard it, but I guess it's true.
clips.end_matched: These are strange times.

clips.label: Attacked and Recaptured
clips.start_cue: That's where you're supposed to find this clue.
clips.end_cue: We're bringing her back to the temple.
clips.start_matched: That's where you're supposed to find this clue.
clips.end_matched: We're bringing her back to the Temple.

clips.label: Council Expels Ahsoka
clips.start_cue: The Senate requests that Ahsoka Tano be indicted
clips.end_cue: Henceforth, you are barred from the Jedi Order.
clips.start_matched: The Senate requests that Ahsoka Tano be indicted for acts of treason
clips.end_matched: Henceforth, you are barred from the Jedi Order.

clips.label: Ventress Testimony
clips.start_cue: Anakin Skywalker. I know you're behind all of this.
clips.end_cue: It was this Barriss that told us to go there.
clips.start_matched: Anakin Skywalker. I know you're behind all of this.
clips.end_matched: It was this Barriss that told us to go there.

clips.label: Barriss Confrontation / Duel
clips.start_cue: Enter. Barriss, I need to talk to you.
clips.end_cue: Cease hostility!
clips.start_matched: Enter. Barriss. I need to talk to you.
clips.end_matched: Cease hostilities!

clips.label: Barriss's Confession
clips.start_cue: The members of the court have reached a decision.
clips.end_cue: Take her away.
clips.start_matched: The members of the court have reached a decision.
clips.end_matched: Take her away.

clips.label: The Great Trial Offer
clips.start_cue: Ahsoka, I am so sorry about everything.
clips.end_cue: Back into the Order you may come.
clips.start_matched: Ahsoka, I am so sorry, about everything.
clips.end_matched: Back into the Order you may come.

clips.label: THE DEPARTURE
clips.start_cue: They're asking you back, Ahsoka. I'm asking you back.
clips.end_cue: I know.
clips.start_matched: They're asking you back, Ahsoka. I'm asking you back.
clips.end_matched: I know.

clips.label: Dooku + Qui-Gon: Corruption
clips.start_cue: We'll be arriving shortly, Master.
clips.end_cue: You're a much wiser man than I, Qui-Gon Jinn.
clips.start_matched: We'll be arriving shortly, Master.
clips.end_matched: You're a much wiser man than I, Qui-Gon Jinn.

clips.label: Dooku + Mace: Murdered Jedi
clips.start_cue: You've been studying that tablet for a long time.
clips.end_cue: How kind of you, Master Jedi.
clips.start_matched: You've been studying that tablet for a long time.
clips.end_matched: How kind of you, Master Jedi.

clips.label: Senate Speech
clips.start_cue: Teckla Minnau.
clips.end_cue: defeating this bill.
clips.start_matched: Teckla Minnau...
clips.end_matched: by defeating this bill!

clips.label: Palpatine Coda
clips.start_cue: Isn't it remarkable, that one can have all the power in the galaxy
clips.end_cue: We must let the wheels of the senate turn.
clips.start_matched: Isn't it remarkable that one can have all the power in the galaxy,
clips.end_matched: We must let the wheels of the Senate turn.

clips.label: Yoda: Fear Is the Path
clips.start_cue: How feel you?
clips.end_cue: I sense much fear in you.
clips.start_matched: How feel you?
clips.end_matched: I sense much fear in you.

clips.label: The Boy Is Dangerous
clips.start_cue: The Force is strong with him.
clips.end_cue: The boy is dangerous. They all sense it.
clips.start_matched: The Force is strong with him.
clips.end_matched: The boy is dangerous. They all sense it. Why can't you?

clips.label: Good Apprentice
clips.start_cue: I'm sorry for my behaviour, Master.
clips.end_cue: I foresee you will become a great Jedi knight.
clips.start_matched: I'm... I'm sorry for my behavior, Master.
clips.end_matched: I foresee you will become a great Jedi knight.

clips.label: Shmi's Goodbye
clips.start_cue: And he has been freed.
clips.end_cue: Don't look back.
clips.start_matched: - But that's so wonderful, Ani. - And he has been freed.
clips.end_matched: Don't look back.

clips.label: The Duel of the Fates
clips.start_cue: We'll handle this.
clips.end_cue: [Qui-Gon separated by energy barriers]
clips.start_matched: - We'll handle this. - We'll take the long way.

clips.label: Qui-Gon Dies
clips.start_cue: No.
clips.end_cue: Train him.
clips.start_matched: No.
clips.end_matched: Train him.

clips.label: Funeral + Always Two There Are
clips.start_cue: Confer on you the level of Jedi knight the council does.
clips.end_cue: But which was destroyed? The master or the apprentice?
clips.start_matched: Confer on you the level of Jedi knight the council does.
clips.end_matched: But which was destroyed? The master or the apprentice?

clips.label: Dooku Exploitation
clips.start_cue: What is to be done, my lord?
clips.end_cue: It's all right, Ani.
clips.start_matched: What is to be done, my lord?
clips.end_matched: It's all right, Ani.

clips.label: VO: Republic Under Sith Control

clips.end_matched: Then let me give you peace, Master Yaddle.

clips.label: Confession + Merrik Standoff

clips.end_cue: He was going to blow up the ship.
clips.start_matched: Obi-Wan, it looks like I may never see you again.
clips.end_matched: - Anakin... - What? He was gonna blow up the ship.

clips.label: Still Not Sure About the Beard
clips.start_cue: How ironic to meet again
clips.end_cue: She is indeed.
clips.start_matched: How ironic to meet again only to find we're on opposing sides.
clips.end_matched: - A very remarkable woman. - She is indeed.

clips.label: She Is or You?
clips.start_cue: I have been looking for you.
clips.end_cue: Then we should have no problems, should we?
clips.start_matched: I've been looking for you.
clips.end_matched: Then we should have no problems, should we?

clips.label: Spider Legs
clips.start_cue: I'm here at last, brother.
clips.end_cue: I must have revenge.
clips.start_matched: I'm here at last, brother.
clips.end_matched: I must have revenge.

clips.label: Talzin Restores Maul
clips.start_cue: Patience, brother.
clips.end_cue: Yes, we shall start with revenge.
clips.start_matched: Patience, brother. We're almost home.
clips.end_matched: Yes, we shall start with revenge.

clips.label: Ventress Team-Up
clips.start_cue: I like your new legs. They make you look taller.
clips.end_cue: I learned from watching you.
clips.start_matched: I like your new legs. They make you look taller.
clips.end_matched: I learned from watching you.

clips.label: Alliance Proposed
clips.start_cue: We are Sith.
clips.end_cue: Another weakness.
clips.start_matched: We are Sith.
clips.end_matched: Another weakness.

clips.label: Shadow Collective + False Flag
clips.start_cue: Our brothers are in favor of an alliance
clips.end_cue: Vizsla! Vizsla! Vizsla!
clips.start_matched: Our brothers are in favor of an alliance to liberate Mandalore.
clips.end_matched: Vizsla! Vizsla! Vizsla!

clips.label: Maul Kills Vizsla
clips.start_cue: I challenge you, one warrior to another.
clips.end_cue: Rule my people.
clips.start_matched: I challenge you, one warrior to another,
clips.end_matched: Rule my people.

clips.label: Satine's Message
clips.start_cue: This is a message for Obi-Wan Kenobi.
clips.end_cue: If Kenobi comes to rescue his friend, he will have to come alone.
clips.start_matched: This is a message for Obi-Wan Kenobi.
clips.end_matched: If Kenobi comes to rescue his friend, he will have to come alone.

clips.label: It Takes Strength
clips.start_cue: It takes strength to resist the dark side.
clips.end_cue: Only the weak embrace it.
clips.start_matched: It takes strength to resist the dark side.
clips.end_matched: Only the weak embrace it.

clips.label: Satine's Murder
clips.start_cue: We meet again, Kenobi.
clips.end_cue: Take him to his cell to rot.
clips.start_matched: We meet again, Kenobi.
clips.end_matched: Take him to his cell to rot.

clips.label: Sidious Arrives
clips.start_cue: I sense a presence
clips.end_cue: I have other uses for you.
clips.start_matched: Hmm... I sense a presence. A presence I haven't felt since...
